name: metrics: --export otlp converts JSONL into OTLP/HTTP JSON envelope on stdout
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/metrics.sh" --emit foo.bar --value 1 --file m.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/metrics.sh" --export otlp --file m.jsonl 2>otlp.json && grep -E '"resourceMetrics":\[' otlp.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
